title: Federated single-cell QTL meta-analysis reveals novel disease mechanisms
abstract_snippet: Federated cis-eQTL meta-analysis across 12 studies, cell-type-specific regulatory effects.
summary: Federated single-cell cis-eQTL meta-analysis across 12 studies revealing cell-type-specific genetic regulation of gene expression. Highly relevant methodology for understanding how regulatory variants exert cell-type-specific effects -- core question for autism noncoding variant interpretation.
